title: Basit Hesap Makinesi
subtitle: Toplama, cikarma, carpma, bolme islemleri.
code:
def calculate(a, b, op):
    if op == "+":
        return a + b
    elif op == "-":
        return a - b
    elif op == "*":
        return a * b
    elif op == "/":
        if b == 0:
            print("Hata: Sifira bolme!")
            return None
        return a / b
    else:
        print("Gecersiz islem:", op)
        return None


x, y = 15, 4

print(f"x = {x}, y = {y}")
print(f"x + y = {calculate(x, y, '+')}")
print(f"x - y = {calculate(x, y, '-')}")
print(f"x * y = {calculate(x, y, '*')}")
print(f"x / y = {calculate(x, y, '/')}")

# Sifira bolme testi
print("\nSifira bolme testi:")
calculate(10, 0, "/")

# Yuzde hesaplama
total = 250
discount = 15
final_price = total - (total * discount / 100)
print(f"\n{total} TL'nin %{discount} indirimli hali: {final_price} TL")

# Operator listesiyle toplu islem
print("\nTum islemler:")
for op in ["+", "-", "*", "/"]:
    print(f"{x} {op} {y} = {calculate(x, y, op)}")
